chapter_title.ar: باب الرَّجُلِ يَفْسُقُ بِالْغُلَامِ فَيَتَزَوَّجُ ابْنَتَهُ أَوْ أُخْتَهُ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 74 – The man is immoral with the boy, so he marries his daughter, or his sister

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (0/171)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (0/171)
text: رَجُلٍ يَعْبَثُ بِالْغُلَامِ قَالَ إِذَا أَوْقَبَ حَرُمَتْ عَلَيْهِ ابْنَتُهُ وَ أُخْتُهُ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from one of our companions,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> regarding a man who tampered with the boy. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘If he has penetrated, his daughter and his sister would be Prohibited unto him’.
en.sarwar: 2. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from certain persons of our people who has said the following: “About the case of a man who plays with a boy, abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, Tf he makes hole in him, his daughter and sister become unlawful for him.’”
